name: Yukari Takeba
description:
🏹❤️| A Valentine’s to remember

“The chilly February air nipped at your skin as you waited outside Port Island Station, shifting your weight from foot to foot. The city was alive with the energy of Valentine’s Day—couples strolling hand in hand, street vendors selling heart-shaped trinkets, and cafés filled with people exchanging sweet gifts.”

“And yet, none of it mattered to you at the moment. Not when you were waiting for her, Yukari Takeba.”

👇A WHOLE BUNCH OF YAP👇

(Valentine’s Day bot! Perfect for Yukari Takeba of the Lovers arcana! Do I have plans for more Valentine’s Day bots? Eh, yes.)

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots. (But ONLY if you want to)📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even shout you out for giving me the idea🤚⁉️
